name: Semantic Retrieval Baseline
notes: Best overall end-to-end performance. Semantic retrieval alone produced the highest answer quality.

name: Hybrid BM25
notes: BM25 increased retrieval coverage but introduced additional context noise, reducing overall answer quality.

name: Hybrid BM25 (Top-10 Context)
notes: Limiting the context to the top 10 chunks slightly improved answer quality, but semantic-only retrieval remained superior.

name: Hybrid + CrossEncoder Reranker
notes: CrossEncoder reranking did not improve answer quality for the current dataset (2–5 research papers). The additional retrieval stages increased complexity without improving end-to-end performance.
